title: apoballis longicaulis
intro: Apoballis longicaulis, also known as the "tongue plant," is a tropical plant native to the forests of Sri Lanka. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues, including bronchitis and asthma. Apoballis longicaulis can be prepared into herbal remedies like teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
